race.description: Share Bets With Tabtouch Bet Loop Empress (G2)
race.comment: Last season's WA Oaks winner FAKENIT (2) should be nearing her peak after coming from wider barriers for second in both starts since a spell. She is two from two when third-up so should be peaking now and is well served by the low draw. PENNY BLACK NZ (7) was far from disgraced from a 70m handicap last start and had recorded a series of top-three finishes prior, highlighted by a G3 win. Draws a little wide but is good enough to win if things go her way. A wider draw poses more of a challenge for DELIGHTFUL PEG NZ (8) but she is impossible to knock after winning all four starts at this venue since arriving from NZ, beating FAKENIT in her last two. The ace draw gives WONDERFUL TO FLY (1) every chance to produce her best while COPY CAT QUEEN (11) strikes at 50 per cent at this circuit and distance and is a threat if she gets the gaps from her second row draw.
